expectations.text: Report includes sections: Scope Analyzed, Findings, Refactor Actions, Validation Plan.
expectations.evidence: Checked required section headers in report.

expectations.text: Findings classify duplication into exact duplicate, near duplicate, or reimplementation.
expectations.evidence: Checked presence of all three duplication classes.

expectations.text: Validation plan is repository-agnostic and does not hardcode Next.js-only commands.
expectations.evidence: Checked validation content for framework-specific Next.js-only commands.

expectations.text: Report includes backend-oriented pattern categories and does not require JSX/TSX context.
expectations.evidence: Checked backend category terms and absence of JSX/TSX dependency framing.

expectations.text: At least two prioritized deduplication actions are listed with rationale.
expectations.evidence: Counted prioritized actions and rationale marker.

expectations.text: Risk notes mention behavior-preservation concerns for refactors.
expectations.evidence: Checked risk notes for behavior preservation wording.

expectations.text: Report addresses script/config/test duplication, not only UI components.
expectations.evidence: Checked mention of script, config, and test duplication patterns.

expectations.text: Report proposes concrete consolidation actions tied to repository structure.
expectations.evidence: Checked for concrete consolidation proposals tied to structure.

expectations.text: Verification steps include at least one targeted check and one broader check.
expectations.evidence: Checked for both targeted and broad verification steps.
